steps.assistant_text: Bit-stream walker (2A9B8/2A9F0 reader family), 90.7%->exact from a pure 3-register rotation. (1) i-init BEFORE base-init flips i to $v0 (unconstrained greedy first-ucode-appearance). (2) Explicit int chain var s = a1; if (s & 1){...} a1 = s >> 1; + dead while(0){ s = a1; } anchor before base-init — s colors $v1, int keeps sra, the s/a1 split materializes the per-step andi/move normalize chain. (3) Last 2 diffs = swapped ENTRY MOVES: dead while(0){ i = 0; } anchor + real inits reordered base-then-i — ANCHORS CONTROL COLORING, STATEMENT ORDER CONTROLS EMISSION (the clean two-knob formulation).

metadata.verification: 62/62 word-exact (both build paths, reloc-free) + make ROM byte-identical (promoted)
